---
title: "Lady Lucy Caroline Herbert"
---

## Lady Lucy Caroline Herbert

**Dates:** (1819/20-1884)

### Description

church worker

### Biography

Eldest sister of the 3rd Earl of Powis, she married (1865) Frederick Calvert (d. 1891). Her sister Lady Harriet Jane Herbert (1831/2- 1880) had also worked for the New Zealand Bells.

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 23d [after 1865]
- Letter from Aug 6th [1862]
- Letter from March 5th [1862[[footnote:2]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
